audit_items.proof_trace: The cork_dllist_foreach_void macro dereferences curr->next after close_and_free_server() frees the server object containing the entries field. The macro increments via curr=next; next=curr->next, causing UAF when accessing the freed entries.next pointer.
audit_items.attack_scenario: External attacker sends SIGINT/SIGTERM to trigger program cleanup, causing memory corruption in free_connections() that can lead to arbitrary code execution.
